zh.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla是Karl Eriksson Färla和NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld的兒子，出生。他和Brita Björnsdotter至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla是Karl Eriksson Färla和NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld的儿子，出生。他和Brita Björnsdotter至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Färla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jose, Juan, Carlos, Enrique, Lourdes, Ana, Arturo, Cristina, Ernesto, Guillermo, Hernan.

Spanish and Catalan: probably a nickname from Catalan falla ‘torch’ or ‘bonfire’ (in particular one which was lit in the streets of a city on public festivals), or a metonymic occupational name for one who lit such a bonfire.
Spanish: perhaps also a nickname from falla ‘flaw, error, doubt’ (from Latin falla).

nameMeanings.name: Bengt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

nameMeanings.name: Karlsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Anders, Alf, Bjorn, Erik, Kerstin, Agust, Elnar, Fritjof, Gudmundur, Johan, Kristinn.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name   Karl   (see also   Charles  ). Compare   Carlsson  .

variants.name: Karlson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Algot, Lars, Nils, Eskil, Holger, Knute, Lennart, Sven.  German Kurt, Hans, Otto.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Karlsson  .
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Karlsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Karl
meanings: equivalent of   Charles  , also used in the English-speaking world.  See also  Carl .

en.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla was born as the son of Karl Eriksson Färla and NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. He had at least 1 daughter with Brita Björnsdotter.

fr.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla est né, fils de Karl Eriksson Färla et NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Brita Björnsdotter.

de.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla wurde, als Sohn von Karl Eriksson Färla und NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld geboren. Er hatte mit Brita Björnsdotter mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla è nato il come figlio di Karl Eriksson Färla e NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Brita Björnsdotter.

ja.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson FärlaはKarl Eriksson FärlaとNN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköldの息子として生まれた。彼はBrita Björnsdotterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla(은)는 Karl Eriksson Färla(와)과 NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Brita Björnsdotter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla nasceu filho de Karl Eriksson Färla e NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Brita Björnsdotter.

ru.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla родился. Его родителей звали Karl Eriksson Färla и NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Brita Björnsdotter.

es.lifeSummary: Bengt Karlsson Färla nació como hijo de Karl Eriksson Färla y NN Nilsdotter Sågskura Kluven Sköld. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Brita Björnsdotter.
